title: Nyla's First Day Friends
synopsis: Nyla feels scared on her first day at animal school, but with the help of her diverse animal classmates, she discovers that being brave and kind helps her make wonderful new friends.

pages.text: Nyla held Mama's hand tight as they walked to the big red school. Her tummy felt scared and wobbly. "What if the other animals don't like me?" she whispered. Mama gave her a warm hug and said, "You are brave and kind, little one."

illustration.description: A young Black girl with curly hair in colorful barrettes walking nervously toward a cheerful red brick school building. Her mother, a tall woman with braided hair, holds her hand reassuringly. The school has bright yellow windows and a welcoming entrance with colorful flowers. Bright cartoon style with soft, textured backgrounds.
illustration.alt: Nyla walking to school with her mother

pages.text: Inside the classroom, Nyla saw many animal friends playing together. There was Leo the lion reading a book, Rosa the rabbit painting, and Sam the squirrel building blocks. But Nyla felt too scared to say hello. She sat alone in the corner, feeling sad.

illustration.description: A bright classroom with diverse animal characters playing happily. Leo is a golden lion with a friendly mane reading, Rosa is a brown rabbit with paint-splattered apron, and Sam is a gray squirrel stacking colorful blocks. Nyla sits alone looking shy and worried, surrounded by cheerful primary colors and rounded classroom furniture.
illustration.alt: Nyla sitting alone while animal friends play in the classroom

pages.text: Teacher Ms. Owl noticed Nyla looking sad. "Would you like to join circle time?" she asked gently. Nyla's heart beat fast, but she felt a little brave. She walked slowly to the colorful carpet where all the animals were sitting.

illustration.description: A wise brown owl wearing glasses and a colorful cardigan gesturing kindly toward Nyla. The circle time area has a rainbow carpet with various animal students sitting cross-legged, including a panda, a fox, and a turtle. Warm, inviting lighting fills the space with soft yellow and orange tones.
illustration.alt: Ms. Owl inviting Nyla to join circle time with animal classmates

pages.text: "Let's share something that makes us happy," said Ms. Owl. Leo said, "Books make me happy!" Rosa said, "Painting makes me happy!" When it was Nyla's turn, she whispered, "Singing makes me happy." Her voice was quiet, but she felt proud for sharing.

illustration.description: The circle of diverse animal friends sitting together on the rainbow carpet. Leo the lion holds a picture book with excitement, Rosa the rabbit shows her colorful painting, and Nyla speaks softly with a small smile beginning to form. The scene is warm and encouraging with bright, friendly colors and gentle expressions on everyone's faces.
illustration.alt: Animals sharing what makes them happy during circle time

pages.text: "Will you sing for us?" asked Rosa kindly. Nyla felt nervous but brave. She stood up and sang a happy song about friendship. All the animals clapped and smiled. "That was beautiful!" said Leo. Nyla felt warm and happy inside.

illustration.description: Nyla standing confidently in the center of the circle, singing with joy. Her arms are outstretched and her face beams with happiness. The diverse animal audience claps enthusiastically - Leo the lion, Rosa the rabbit, Sam the squirrel, plus a koala, a penguin, and a deer all showing delight. Bright musical notes float around Nyla in cheerful colors.
illustration.alt: Nyla singing happily while her new animal friends clap and cheer

pages.text: At recess, Rosa asked, "Do you want to paint with me?" Sam asked, "Do you want to build blocks?" Leo asked, "Do you want to read together?" Nyla felt so happy! She wasn't scared anymore. She had found wonderful friends who liked her just as she was.

illustration.description: The playground scene with Nyla surrounded by her new animal friends, all inviting her to play different activities. The background shows colorful playground equipment, swings, and slides. Everyone has big, genuine smiles and welcoming body language. The scene bursts with joy using bright primary colors, blue sky, and green grass with a textured, construction paper feel.
illustration.alt: Nyla surrounded by animal friends on the playground, all inviting her to play

metadata.illustrationStyle: Bright, cheerful cartoon style with expressive faces. Bold primary colors. Rounded, friendly shapes. Slightly textured backgrounds like construction paper.

questions.question: How did Nyla feel when she first got to school?
questions.explanation: Nyla felt scared when she first arrived at school. Her tummy felt wobbly and she was worried the other animals might not like her.

questions.question: What made Nyla happy?
questions.explanation: Nyla shared that singing made her happy during circle time, and later she sang a beautiful song for her classmates.

questions.question: Who was the teacher?
questions.explanation: Ms. Owl was the kind teacher who helped Nyla feel welcome and invited her to join circle time.

questions.question: How did Nyla feel at the end of the story?
questions.explanation: By the end, Nyla felt happy because she had made wonderful new friends who liked her just as she was.

pages.title: Complete the Story
pages.instructions: Fill in the missing words to complete Nyla's story!
pages.text: Nyla felt _____ on her first day of school. But when she was _____ and shared her singing, she made new _____ who liked her just as she was.

pages.title: Feeling Words
pages.text: At first, Nyla felt _____ and _____. Then she felt _____ when she sang for everyone.
